104.Name: Eruption Column
104.Desc:
COMBO TRIGGER: When the controlled operator performs a <#ba.lastcombo>Final Strike</> on an enemy with <@ba.key>no</> stacks of <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> or <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</>. 
Launches a homing Volcanic Cloud at a target enemy that deals <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</> when close enough to the target. The Volcanic Cloud explodes after a short delay, dealing half of the <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</> and forcibly applying temporary <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</> to nearby enemies.

101.Name: Rocky Whispers
101.Desc:
BASIC ATTACK: 
An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</>. As the controlled operator, <#ba.lastcombo>Final Strike</> also deals <@ba.poise>18</> Stagger. 

DIVE ATTACK: 
Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</> to nearby enemies. 

FINISHER: 
Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</> and recovers some SP.

102.Name: Dolly Rush
102.Desc: Hops on Mr. Dolly and rams the target to deal <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</>. If the target has <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</>, then <#ba.consume>consume</> the <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</> and apply <#ba.physicalvul>Physical Susceptibility</> and <#ba.spellvul>Arts Susceptibility</> to the target.

103.Name: Wooly Party
103.Desc: Ardelia enters a mobile channeling state and summons the aid of Mr. Dolly. Multiple copies of Mr. Dolly are thrown in random directions. Each copy deals <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</> when hitting the enemy. Each enemy can only take 1 damaging hit every 0.3s.

chr_0025_ardelia_passive_skill_0_1.Name: Friendly Presence
chr_0025_ardelia_passive_skill_0_1.Desc:
The battle skill <@ba.key>Dolly Rush</> creates 3 <@ba.key>Shadows of Mr. Dolly</> after hitting the enemy. The copies of Mr. Dolly scattered by the ultimate <@ba.key>Wooly Party</> also have a 10.0% chance to create <@ba.key>Shadows of Mr. Dolly</> when they fall to the ground. When the controlled operator touches a <@ba.key>Shadow of Mr. Dolly</>, Ardelia restores the said operator's HP by <@ba.heal>[45 + Will×0.38]</>.
<@ba.info>If the controlled operator is already at max HP, then restore the HP of the teammate with lowest percentage HP.</>
<@ba.info>Shadows of Mr. Dolly last for 10s and up to 10 can exist in the battlefield.</>

fac_chr_0025_ardelia_0_1.Name: Tales of the Land β
fac_chr_0025_ardelia_0_1.Desc: Assign to Reception Room to grant operator clue collecting efficiency +20%

chr_0025_ardelia_passive_skill_1_1.Name: Mountainpeak Surfer
chr_0025_ardelia_passive_skill_1_1.Desc:
Battle skill <@ba.key>Dolly Rush</> improved: Triggering the additional effect while an enemy with <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</> is nearby immediately casts the battle skill again. 
<@ba.info>This effect only triggers once per active battle skill casting.</>

fac_chr_0025_ardelia_1_2.Name: Mr. Dolly's Game γ
fac_chr_0025_ardelia_1_2.Desc: Assign to Reception Room to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 18%

The copies of Mr. Dolly scattered by the ultimate <@ba.key>Wooly Party</> also have a 10.0% chance to create <@ba.key>Shadows of Mr. Dolly</> when they fall to the ground. When the controlled operator touches a <@ba.key>Shadow of Mr. Dolly</>, Ardelia restores the said operator's HP by <@ba.heal>[63 + Will×0.53]</>.
<@ba.info>If the controlled operator is already at max HP, then restore the HP of the teammate with lowest percentage HP.</>
<@ba.info>Shadows of Mr. Dolly last for 10s and up to 10 can exist in the battlefield.</>

fac_chr_0025_ardelia_0_2.Desc: Assign to Reception Room to grant operator clue collecting efficiency +30%

chr_0025_ardelia_passive_skill_0_3.Desc:
The battle skill <@ba.key>Dolly Rush</> creates 3 <@ba.key>Shadows of Mr. Dolly</> after hitting the enemy. The copies of Mr. Dolly scattered by the ultimate <@ba.key>Wooly Party</> also have a 10.0% chance to create <@ba.key>Shadows of Mr. Dolly</> when they fall to the ground. When the controlled operator touches a <@ba.key>Shadow of Mr. Dolly</>, Ardelia restores the said operator's HP by <@ba.heal>[90 + Will×0.75]</>.
<@ba.info>If the controlled operator is already at max HP, then restore the HP of the teammate with lowest percentage HP.</>
<@ba.info>Shadows of Mr. Dolly last for 10s and up to 10 can exist in the battlefield.</>

fac_chr_0025_ardelia_1_1.Name: Mr. Dolly's Game β
fac_chr_0025_ardelia_1_1.Desc: Assign to Reception Room to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 14%

1.Name: Dolly Paradise
1.Desc: Battle skill <@ba.key>Dolly Rush</> improved: <#ba.consume>Consuming</> <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</> now applies <#ba.physicalvul>Physical Susceptibility</> and <#ba.spellvul>Arts Susceptibility</> with effects <@ba.vup>+8.0%</>.

2.Name: Game Rewards
2.Desc: Talent <@ba.key>Friendly Presence</> improved: When the controlled operator touches the <@ba.key>Shadow of Mr. Dolly</>, Ardelia also treats another allied operator with the lowest percentage HP with half of the treatment effects.

3.Name: Explosive Eruption
3.Desc: Ultimate <@ba.key>Wooly Party</> improved: Duration <@ba.vup>+1</>s; chance to create <@ba.key>Shadow of Mr. Dolly</> is increased to <@ba.vup>1.2</> times the original.

4.Name: Rock Blossom
4.Desc: Ultimate <@ba.key>Wooly Party</> improved: Ultimate Energy cost <@ba.vup>-15.000000000000002%</>.

5.Name: Volcanic Steam
5.Desc: Combo skill <@ba.key>Eruption Column</> improved: Length of cooldown <@ba.vup>-2</>s; DMG multiplier is increased to <@ba.vup>1.2</> times the original; duration of <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</> applied <@ba.vup>+4</>s.
